name: GOLFTEC Novi
about: GOLFTEC is a data-driven golf training studio that offers lessons, club fitting, and practice sessions using advanced technology. They utilize OPTIMOTION motion measurement technology and high-speed video analysis to provide personalized coaching. The facilities are designed for focused improvement, featuring indoor bays equipped with launch monitors and video feedback systems. GOLFTEC caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners looking to master the basics to experienced players aiming to refine their technique. Their approach combines expert instruction with precise swing data to help students achieve measurable results and lower scores.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced motion tracking and launch monitor technology
Personalized improvement plans tailored to individual goals and skill levels
Professional club fitting services that can add an average of 21 yards off the tee

food_and_drink.notes: No information about on-site food services

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors are used for lessons and club fitting to measure ball flight and club data

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or use equipment provided by GOLFTEC during lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no information provided about outside food or drink policies, so it's best to check with the location directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator time can vary depending on the number of players and the simulator software being used.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes young golfers with technology-based instruction suitable for various age groups.
